# miniz (vendored)

Single-file ZIP/deflate library used by the spreadsheet File I/O
(`UltraCanvasSpreadsheetFileIO.cpp`) for reading/writing ODS/XLSX archives.

- Upstream: https://github.com/richgel999/miniz
- Version: 3.0.2
- License: MIT (see LICENSE)

Only `miniz.h` / `miniz.c` are vendored. Do not edit; update by replacing
with a newer upstream amalgamation.
